summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sanitary Control System for dormitory rooms. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend date filter, single room rating modal, and batch rating modal all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
API endpoints are properly protected with JWT authentication
Floor manager access restriction works correctly (can only rate their assigned floor)
Red highlighting for rooms with rating 1-3 works as expected
seed_data_creation: Test inspections created during testing for floors 2, blocks 1-7
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Date filter on BlocksList page, single room rating modal, batch rating modal ('Оценить всё'). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_sanitary_control.py cover auth, blocks, inspections, residents, admin, and transport APIs.

frontend_tests: Date filter toggle button on BlocksList
Block status indicator based on filtered data
Single room rating modal (click on room card)
Batch rating button ('Оценить всё') visibility for admins
Batch rating modal with all 3 rooms

features_verified.date_filter_on_floor_page: Working - filters inspections by date range, shows count
features_verified.single_room_rating_modal: Working - opens on room card click, rating 1-5, date selection, save
features_verified.batch_rating_modal: Working - 'Оценить всё' button opens modal with all 3 rooms, submit saves all
features_verified.rating_via_api: Working - POST /api/inspections with auth saves ratings correctly
features_verified.admin_auth: Working - login redirects admin to /admin panel, token persists across pages
